I am going to send the agenda this afternoon.
I am not going to be in the office on Friday.
Are you going to join the call on Monday?
Let us reschedule the meeting to Thursday.
I am going to send the agenda.
We are going to confirm the shipment.
She is going to meet the supplier.
Fernanda, can we arrange the plan for next week?
Of course. I am going to open the agenda now.
On Monday, we are going to confirm the shipment with Colombia.
Good. And the supplier meeting on Wednesday?
I am going to meet them online at three. But I am not going to be here on Friday.
Then let us reschedule our call. Is there a free slot on Thursday?
Thursday at ten is perfect. Could you set up the room?
Sure. I am going to set it up and send you the appointment.

Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I am going to send you the new agenda this afternoon. Next week is busy for the trading team. On Monday, we are going to confirm the shipment with Colombia. On Wednesday, I am going to meet the supplier online at three. One more thing: I am not going to be in the office on Friday, so we need to reschedule our weekly call. Could you find a free slot for me? Thank you so much. Talk soon.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. No problem at all. I am going to look at the calendar right now. I am going to move our weekly call to Thursday morning. I think ten o'clock is a good slot. I am not going to schedule anything before ten, so we will have time to talk. I am also going to set up the online room for the supplier meeting on Wednesday. I will send you the full agenda before Monday. Have a great week.

First, open the calendar and look for a free slot. Then, say your plan with going to, like I am going to send the agenda. Next, suggest a new time, like Let us reschedule the call to Thursday. Finally, confirm the appointment, like The meeting is at ten on Thursday.
